mapper.sql: id AS report_id, application_id, report_type, report_url, report_version, generated_by, generated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_report (application_id, report_type, report_url, report_version, generated_by, generated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{reportType}, #{reportUrl}, #{reportVersion}, #{generatedBy}, #{generatedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM approval_report WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
